_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to inspire and lead a culture of innovation.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to lead through organizational resistance to data and AI transformation, including navigating political dynamics, competing stakeholder interests, and cultural inertia.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-004 (LS, cosine: 0.515), LS-A-005 (LS, cosine: 0.465).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.353). Shared vocabulary: [ability, lead]. DCWF-only terms [culture, innovation, inspire] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, competing, cultural, data, dynamics, inertia] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.904 (P=0.935, R=0.874). P exceeds R by 0.061 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (80.9%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Ability to inspire and lead a culture of innovation." and "Ability to lead through organizational resistance to data and AI transformation,". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.530 > STS 0.353 (gap +0.177). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability, lead] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.7%. Shared tokens: [ability, lead]. DCWF-only: [culture, innovation, inspire]. WIDAI-only: [ai, competing, cultural, data, dynamics, inertia].
